card1.title: GAMEPLAY CONCEPT
card1.description: Welcome to the Kering Learning Odyssey. By embarking on this interactive serious game, each Kering employee becomes an Explorer of the Future. As more players join the journey, new territories unlock, each representing a critical skill needed to deliver with excellence today and continue growing tomorrow. Your journey culminates in the final territory, the Learning Agility Oasis, where you will reflect on how to navigate today’s fast-changing world with confidence and curiosity.

card2.title: KEY LEARNINGS
card2.description: In every territory, you will complete challenges designed to help you experiment, reflect, and strengthen the skills of the future. Upon completing a territory, you will unlock its key learnings, consolidating the insights gained and reinforcing your ability to apply them in your day-to-day work.

card3.title: COLLECTIBLE OWLS
card3.description: Once all the challenges are completed, each territory awards a Silver Owl: an emblem of mastery for that skill. After collecting all six Silver Owls, the Golden Owl is revealed as a symbol of integrated learning across the Odyssey.

card4.title: PRIZES
card4.description: Top Explorers in each global region will unlock exclusive House Experiences designed to strengthen Group culture at a local level. These may include in-store immersions, archive visits, or behind-the-scenes moments with one of Kering’s Houses!
